Dashboard.title: Hello, {name}
Dashboard.subtitle: Here is your overview for today.

LandingPage.heroSubtitle: TheBorrow is the easiest way to document your personal loans, borrowed items, and shared expenses. Say goodbye to awkward reminders and lost items.
LandingPage.whySubtitle: Build trust with your friends and family by keeping everything documented securely and clearly.
LandingPage.feature1Desc: Easily see what you've lent out and what you've borrowed in one central dashboard.
LandingPage.feature2Desc: Create digital records of your loans, including photos, conditions, and expected return dates.
LandingPage.feature3Desc: Keep relationships healthy with clear expectations and straightforward accountability.
LandingPage.ctaTitle: Ready to bring clarity to your sharing?
LandingPage.ctaSubtitle: Join today and never lose track of a loaned item or borrowed money again.

Auth.loginHeroTitle: Financial clarity for the modern burrow.
Auth.loginHeroSubtitle: Securely manage your lending and borrowing with communal trust and clear organization.
Auth.loginSubheading: Log in to your secure burrow dashboard.
Auth.registerHeroSubtitle: Create your account and start tracking loans transparently across your community.
Auth.registerSubheading: Set up your secure burrow profile.
